## Resource Details

- Name:
- URL:
- Type (book/course/tool/community/podcast/newsletter/blog/YouTube):
- Free or paid:
- If paid, price:

## Category

Which section should this go in?

- [ ] Books
- [ ] Courses
- [ ] Communities
- [ ] Podcasts
- [ ] Newsletters
- [ ] Tools
- [ ] Blogs
- [ ] YouTube Channels

## Why This Resource

Explain why this resource is valuable. Include specifics:

- What problem does it solve?
- How is it different from existing resources in the list?
- Have you personally used it? What was your experience?

## Target Audience

Who benefits most from this resource?

- [ ] Beginners (0-1 years experience)
- [ ] Mid-level (2-5 years)
- [ ] Senior (5+ years)
- [ ] Career changers
- [ ] Interview preparation specifically

## Quality Check

- [ ] I have personally used this resource
- [ ] It has been updated within the last 12 months
- [ ] It is focused on software engineering (not general tech)
- [ ] It is not a duplicate of something already in the repo
